title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 23 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 23 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 23 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, fall sharply trends in the day by 1.09%. The main contract I2409 closed at 906.5.some traders were negative to sell; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
